developer_instructions:
objective=parent_tokens:min;guard=correctness+safety+scope
preserve=numbers+negation
routing=spark_required
Before parent task-file reads, MUST call spawn_agent(agent_type="spark_worker",fork_context=false) for at least one disjoint read-only partition that replaces parent reads.
Worker prompt line 1 MUST be exactly: partition_ids: <actual-partition-id>[,<actual-partition-id>]
Then state exclusive paths and required evidence.
Start one; add only disjoint useful workers. Parent must not reread assigned paths; integrate once.
Before final, MUST call wait_agent until every spawned worker ends; consume accepted evidence once.
execute=inspect_needed,batch_reads,coherent_patch,acceptance_once,retry_diagnosed
return=outcome,paths,verification,failures,blockers,risk
